goal: Reduce 6 query + 6 result types to 3 query types producing tree nodes directly, with one unified page component

steps.action: Harden existing integration tests before refactoring. In engine-reports.integration-test.js: (a) SnapshotQuery/net_worth test (lines ~588-607): replace month-name-only assertions with actual fixture total values — assert specific dollar amounts for each month point, not just that 'Jan', 'Feb' etc. appear. (b) Pivot ComputedRow test (lines ~302-306): replace regex-only assertion with actual computed percentage values from fixtures — e.g., assert 'Food % of Income' row shows correct ratios per year column. (c) Group by Payee test (lines ~186-189): replace 'at least one visible' with assertions on specific payee names and totals from fixtures. Run `yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap:file test/engine-reports.integration-test.js` — all tests must pass. Commit: harden integration test assertions with fixture-based values.

Delete removed variant type definitions. In financial-query.type.js: remove AccountQuery, ExpressionQuery, RunningBalanceQuery variants. Make TransactionQuery.grouping required (remove ? from 'IRGrouping?'). Add `grouping: 'IRGrouping?'` to SnapshotQuery variant. In query-result.type.js: remove Scalar, FilteredEntities, RunningBalance variants. Delete ir-expression.js from query-language/types/ if separate file exists. Run `yarn types:generate-all`. Run style validator on changed type-definition files — verify isCompliant: true.
[CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on run-financial-query.js and to-financial-query-description.js. Report style card violations found. Wait for approval before proceeding.

Delete engine code for removed variants. Delete resolve-expression.js. In run-financial-query.js: remove collectAccountQueryResult, collectExpressionQueryResult, collectRunningBalanceResult, collectResultTotal, and their .match() arms. Keep MAX_DEPTH constant and depth parameter as a zero-cost safety net. In to-financial-query-description.js: remove AccountQuery, ExpressionQuery, RunningBalanceQuery handlers. Add SnapshotQuery grouping to description if present. Update query-language/types/index.js barrel export (remove IRExpression re-export). Clean up merge-chip-filters.js comment referencing ExpressionQuery (line ~91). Run style validator on changed files.

Delete page components and update seed queries. Delete FilteredEntitiesResultPage.jsx and RunningBalanceResultPage.jsx. In report-metadata.js: remove bank_accounts and running_balance from SEED_QUERIES and SEED_QUERY_METADATA. Add new seed query spending_over_time: SnapshotQuery('spending_over_time', 'Spending by category over time', 'balances', undefined, IRGrouping('category'), IRDateRange.Year(2025), 'monthly'). Add its SEED_QUERY_METADATA entry (page: TimeSeriesResultPage for now, filters: date + category + account). Remove unused imports. Update picker-config.js if it references removed seeds; add spending_over_time. Run style validator on changed files.

Delete and update tests for removed variants. Delete expression-evaluator.tap.js entirely. In run-financial-query.tap.js: remove test groups for AccountQuery (d), ExpressionQuery (e), RunningBalanceQuery (g), and ExpressionQuery depth limit (h). In to-financial-query-description.tap.js: remove tests for AccountQuery, ExpressionQuery, RunningBalanceQuery descriptions. In seed-query-execution.tap.js: remove bank_accounts and running_balance entries, add spending_over_time entry. Run `yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap` — all remaining tests must pass. Run style validator on changed test files.
Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.

git add changed files and commit: remove AccountQuery, ExpressionQuery, RunningBalanceQuery and all downstream code. Add SnapshotQuery.grouping field and spending_over_time seed query. Use commit-changes.md format.

[CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on selectors.js (has 6 COMPLEXITY exemptions — structural), run-financial-query.js, and QueryResultPage.jsx. Report style card violations found. Wait for approval before proceeding.

Remove QueryResult/QueryResultTree indirection in one pass. In run-financial-query.js: return tree nodes and raw data directly instead of wrapping in QueryResult/QueryResultTree constructors — TransactionQuery returns {nodes, source, columns?, computed?}, PositionQuery returns {nodes, source}, SnapshotQuery returns {snapshots, source}, remaining Pivot path returns {columns, rows, cells, computed, rowTotals}. In selectors.js: remove QueryResult.match() dispatch from _queryResult, pass engine output through directly. Delete type-definitions/derived/query-result.type.js and query-result-tree.type.js. Delete generated src/types/query-result.js and query-result-tree.js. Update src/types/index.js barrel. Run `yarn types:generate-all`. In report-metadata.js: remove `page` field from category_by_year, net_worth, and spending_over_time SEED_QUERY_METADATA — all queries route to QueryResultPage. Run style validator on all changed files.

Update QueryResultPage.jsx to handle all result shapes directly (Pivot data as flat table, TimeSeries data as chart+table). Add `chart: true` to SnapshotQuery seed metadata entries (net_worth, spending_over_time) in report-metadata.js as the chart opt-in signal. Delete PivotResultPage.jsx and TimeSeriesResultPage.jsx. Reuse TimeSeriesChart component inside QueryResultPage when metadata.chart is true. Verify zero non-useSelector hooks in modified file. Run style validator.

Update all tests for new engine return shape. In run-financial-query.tap.js: update TransactionQuery, PositionQuery, SnapshotQuery, and pivot tests to assert raw objects (not QueryResult wrappers). Update seed-query-execution.tap.js assertions including spending_over_time. Run `yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap` — all tests must pass. Run style validator on changed test files.
Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
git add changed files and commit: remove QueryResult/QueryResultTree indirection — engine returns data directly. Use commit-changes.md format.
[CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on category-tree.js. Report style card violations found. Wait for approval before proceeding.

Add columns? field to CategoryAggregate type and write failing tests. In type-definitions/derived/category-aggregate.type.js: add `columns: 'Object?'` field. Run `yarn types:generate-all`. Write failing tests in category-tree.tap.js: (a) buildColumnGroupedTree builds a 2D tree from sample transactions with category × year — tree is hierarchical, each node has total + count + columns, parent columns roll up from children; (b) buildColumnGroupedTree with quarter and month column dimensions also works. Run tests — must fail. Run style validator.

Implement buildColumnGroupedTree in category-tree.js. Add makeColumnAggregator(getColumnKey) factory in the Factories section — produces an aggregation function tracking per-column values with rollup from children. Add buildColumnGroupedTree(rowDim, colDim, transactions) that uses dimensionConfig for row dimension and an allowlist-based columnKeyExtractors map for column dimension (year, quarter, month — reuse toMonthKey). Pipe through groupByFn -> buildTree -> aggregateTree(makeColumnAggregator(...)) -> map(toGroupNode). Update toCategoryAggregate to pass through agg.columns to the CategoryAggregate constructor. Export buildColumnGroupedTree from CategoryTree. Make failing tests pass. Run style validator. Verify each top-level declaration is under its correct section separator.

Wire buildColumnGroupedTree into engine. In run-financial-query.js: modify collectTransactionQueryResult — when grouping.columns is present, call CategoryTree.buildColumnGroupedTree instead of collectPivotResult. After building the 2D tree, evaluate ComputedRow expressions: build a flat lookup from top-level tree node names to their aggregate.columns (same shape as the old cells grid), then run evaluatePivotExpression against that lookup for each ComputedRow. Return {nodes, source, columns, computed} where computed is {name: {col: value}}. Delete collectPivotResult, collectPivotCell, collectRowTotal, and toColumnBucket (pivot-grid-specific code). Keep evaluatePivotExpression, evaluateBinaryExpr, evaluateRowRef, evaluateBinaryOp, collectComputedColumn, collectComputedByName (these work against the flat lookup extracted from tree nodes). Run style validator.

Update QueryResultPage.jsx to render dynamic value columns from tree node aggregate.columns. When columns are present: column headers from sorted keys, cell values from node.aggregate.columns[key]. When computed is present: render computed rows below the tree with their per-column values. Verify zero non-useSelector hooks. Run style validator.

Rewrite pivot tests for tree shape and add ComputedRow tests. In run-financial-query.tap.js: rewrite the pivot test (group b) to assert tree nodes with columns on aggregates. Add assertions for: hierarchical drill-down, per-column rollup, ComputedRow evaluation (Food % of Income computed row produces correct per-column ratios from tree node values). Update seed-query-execution.tap.js for category_by_year — verify computed rows present. Run `yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap` — all tests must pass. Run style validator.
Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
git add changed files and commit: unify tree and pivot — 2D grouping produces drillable CategoryTreeNode tree with per-column values and ComputedRow evaluation. Use commit-changes.md format.
[CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on run-financial-query.js (modified again). Report style card violations. Wait for approval.

Write failing tests for SnapshotQuery tree output — both ungrouped and grouped. Test (a): SnapshotQuery without grouping produces a single Group node with columns keyed by date points (e.g., {'2025-01-31': 142000, '2025-02-28': 145000}). Test (b): SnapshotQuery with IRGrouping('category') produces a CategoryTreeNode tree where each top-level category has per-date-point cumulative columns, parent rollup is correct, and total across categories matches the ungrouped total. Run tests — must fail. Run style validator.

Implement SnapshotQuery tree output in engine. Modify collectSnapshotQueryResult: (a) Without grouping: produce a single CategoryTreeNode Group node with columns = {date: cumulativeTotal} for each date point. (b) With grouping: pre-sort transactions by date, walk forward through date points maintaining running cumulative sums per category in a mutable accumulator (O(N log N + D*C) not O(D*C*N)), build CategoryTreeNode tree from the accumulated per-category totals at each date point using buildColumnGroupedTree or equivalent. Both cases return {nodes, source, columns: sortedDatePoints}. Run style validator.

Update snapshot tests and add new seed query tests. In run-financial-query.tap.js: update SnapshotQuery test (group f) to assert tree output for both ungrouped and grouped cases. Update seed-query-execution.tap.js: update net_worth assertions for tree shape, add spending_over_time assertions verifying per-category tree with date-point columns. Run `yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap` — all tests must pass. Run style validator.
Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
git add changed files and commit: SnapshotQuery produces tree output — ungrouped (single node) and grouped (per-category tree with cumulative date-point columns). Use commit-changes.md format.

Run integration tests: `yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap:file test/engine-reports.integration-test.js`. All hardened tests from step 1 must still pass. Add new integration test coverage with fixture-value assertions for: (a) category_by_year — assert drillable 2D tree renders specific category totals per year column, ComputedRow shows correct computed percentages. (b) spending_over_time — assert grouped snapshot renders per-category rows with specific monthly values from fixtures, chart renders. (c) net_worth — assert tree-shaped output with specific date-point total values from fixtures, chart renders. Fix any failures.

verification: All unit tests pass: yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap
Integration tests pass: yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap:file test/engine-reports.integration-test.js
FinancialQuery has exactly 3 variants: TransactionQuery, PositionQuery, SnapshotQuery
QueryResult and QueryResultTree types no longer exist
No imports of deleted types/pages/files anywhere in src/
category_by_year seed query produces drillable tree with per-column values and ComputedRow evaluation
spending_over_time seed query produces per-category tree with date-point columns
net_worth seed query produces single-row tree with date-point columns and chart rendering
Browser: Spending Engine report loads, expands categories, shows totals
Browser: category_by_year report shows year columns with drillable category rows and computed row
Browser: spending_over_time report shows per-category breakdown over time with chart
Browser: net_worth report shows line chart + tree with date/total columns
Browser: Positions Engine report loads with position tree
Integration tests assert actual fixture values, not just UI element presence
